action.reasoning: Observation: Baseline score 0.5744, success_rate=87.3%, room=78%, tunnel=90%, outdoor=94%. Travel distances 294-406m. Analysis: Need to improve both success rate (especially rooms) and reduce travel distance. The key issues are: 1) Rooms fail more - likely due to complex topology and narrow passages, 2) Travel distance is high - need more efficient paths. I'll improve the planner with: better frontier detection from global map, smarter node selection that considers future utility (lookahead), and more aggressive exploration of unvisited areas. Decision: Rewrite predict.py with improved planner that uses global map frontiers when stuck, better utility scoring, and path efficiency improvements.
